title: Every Mob's a Creeper
description: Every mob acts like a Creeper!
body:
Have you ever been building a house in Minecraft and had the delight of seeing all of your hard work go to waste after one Creeper got the best of you? Well, with Every Mob's A Creeper, you can experience the pleasures of consistent griefing 24/7! There simply is no escape!!! "Every Mob's A Creeper", makes all entities seek out the player, and explode when within proximity. Try this new challenge with your friends, and see who is truly built to survive the worst version of Minecraft!

**Use these new gamerules to configure exactly how much mobs act like Creepers!**

**- allCreepers:** By default, this gamerule is on. All entities now act like Creepers. Chasing the player down and blowing up.

**- noArms:** By default, this gamerule is on. Entities can only attack via explosions.

**- explosionDropLoot:** By default, this gamerule is off. If this gamerule is set to "True," entities will drop their loot even if they successfully explode. *(This is off by default because Creepers do not drop their loot when they successfully 
explode)*

**- onlySpawnCreepers:** By default, this gamerule is off. This will stop other mobs from spawning, and allow Creepers to spawn under any spawning condition other mobs may spawn. Creepers will spawn in groups underwater like fish, and during the day like pigs, when breeding animals, etc. (This gamerule is off by default because it is insane)

I would love to add more gamerules in the future to allow you to perfectly customize this cursed experience!
